# Carrusel de imagenes HDP (Desktop)

<!-- Generated by dd2md from Datadog Synthetics -->
<!-- Source: zqv-dp4-pyn.json -->
## Preconditions
- Browser is open and ready

## Steps
1. Navigate to https://es.stayforlong.com/hotel/es/bcn-urbaness-del-comte_barcelona
2. Click on 'Ver todas (101)' to view all images
3. Click on 'Ver todas (102) Habitaciones' to view rooms
4. Click chevron right icon to navigate carousel
5. Click chevron right icon to navigate carousel
6. Click chevron right icon to navigate carousel
7. Click chevron right icon to navigate carousel
8. Click chevron right icon to navigate carousel
9. Click chevron right icon to navigate carousel
10. Click chevron left icon to navigate carousel
11. Click chevron left icon to navigate carousel
12. Click chevron left icon to navigate carousel
13. Click 'Comprueba disponibilidad' button
